content_body: Beautiful cabin! We enjoyed a great family weekend in this charming and very comfortable home. The guys took a guided fly fishing trip resulting in photos of very large trout. We also enjoyed the shops in Blue Ridge. The best memories were cooking together in this well-appointed kitchen, wading in the river, and, of course, card games in the evening. Loved waking up to the sounds of the river and watching nature from the decks. Thank you for sharing your lovely home with us. Looking forward to another visit!
title: Charming and Very Comfortable Home
